narratives.Overview: The core audio engine: continuous colored-noise generation (white, pink, brown; extensible to more colors) shaped by a 10-band graphic equalizer with a master volume and play/pause transport.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Generate white, pink, and brown noise via an AudioWorklet, selectable at runtime; the color registry is extensible. FR-2: 10 octave-spaced peaking-filter bands (31Hz-16kHz), each with a +/-12dB slider. FR-3: Master volume and play/pause. NFR-1: Parameter changes (sliders, color switch, volume) are click/glitch-free via parameter smoothing. NFR-2: Playback continues uninterrupted while the tab is backgrounded.

items.title: AudioWorklet noise generators (white/pink/brown) with color registry
10-band peaking EQ chain with slider UI
Master gain, transport, and parameter smoothing
